description: President Donald Trump and Democratic rival Joe Biden faced inquisitive voters on separate stages in different cities Thursday night in a substitute for the debate that was meant to be. Here's how some of the rhetoric compared with the facts in the prime-time events and a day of campaigning.
fulltitle: FACT CHECK: Rhetoric from Trump, Biden in the non-debate
